title: Add timestamps to createSpec, updateSpec, createPRD, updatePRD methods
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/worker/state.ts

Read the file. Update createSpec and createPRD methods to include timestamps:

In createSpec, add to the created object:
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),

In updateSpec, add:
  updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),

Same pattern for createPRD and updatePRD.

Commit.
